exercises.title: Measurement Circuit Generator
tasks: Create X-stabilizer circuit with ancilla and CNOTs
Create Z-stabilizer circuit with reversed CNOT direction
Add Hadamard gates for X-basis preparation and measurement
Output circuits in standard gate notation
Visualize circuits with ASCII diagrams
hints: X-stab: |+⟩ ancilla, CNOT control from ancilla
Z-stab: |0⟩ ancilla, CNOT target at ancilla
Include reset, H, CNOT sequence, H, measure

exercises.title: Measurement Scheduler
exercises.description: Implement optimal CNOT scheduling for surface code.
tasks: Assign CNOT time slots avoiding conflicts
Implement NW-NE-SW-SE ordering
Handle boundary stabilizers correctly
Generate parallel schedule for all stabilizers
Verify no qubit conflicts within time slots
hints: Each data qubit in at most 2 CNOTs per slot
One from X-ancilla, one from Z-ancilla

exercises.title: Hook Error Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate and analyze hook error propagation.
tasks: Inject X error on ancilla at different circuit points
Track error propagation through CNOT gates
Compare sequential vs diagonal ordering
Count resulting data qubit errors
Verify diagonal ordering limits error weight
hints: CNOT: X on control → X on target
Track which data qubits have errors
Diagonal: errors spread to non-adjacent pairs

exercises.title: 3D Syndrome Analyzer
tasks: Simulate multiple measurement rounds
Inject data and measurement errors
Build 3D syndrome volume (space × time)
Identify spatial vs temporal defect pairs
Visualize syndrome evolution over time
hints: Data error: defects at same time, different space
Measurement error: defects at same space, different time
Use layers for each time step
